title: tetracera korthalsii var. subrotundata
intro: Tetracera korthalsii var. subrotundata is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Tetracera plant, belonging to the family Dilleniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tetracera korthalsii var. subrotundata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine to treat various ailments.
